custom-ui-style.stylesheet..monaco-workbench .part.editor>.content: border-radius: 24px !important; overflow: hidden !important; background: rgba(15,18,24,0.22) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(22px) saturate(180%) !important;
custom-ui-style.stylesheet..tabs-and-actions-container: background: rgba(20,20,20,0.18) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-radius: 24px 24px 0 0 !important; padding: 6px 10px !important;
custom-ui-style.stylesheet..monaco-workbench .part.sidebar: margin: 12px 0 12px 12px !important; border-radius: 24px !important; overflow: hidden !important; background: rgba(20,20,20,0.12) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(35px) saturate(180%) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03) !important;
custom-ui-style.stylesheet..monaco-workbench .part.activitybar: margin: 12px 0 12px 12px !important; border-radius: 24px !important; overflow: hidden !important; background: rgba(20,20,20,0.12) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(35px) !important;
custom-ui-style.stylesheet..monaco-workbench .part.panel: margin: 0 12px 12px 12px !important; border-radius: 24px !important; overflow: hidden !important; background: rgba(20,20,20,0.18) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(24px) !important; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03) !important;
